sections.markdown:
- Activity: Day 10
- Started: 2025-05-15 17:01
- Distance: 5.7 km
- Moving time: 31:41
- Elapsed time: 31:44
- Elevation gain: 120 m
- Average heart rate: 165.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 183 bpm
- Average watts: 208 W
- Average speed: 10.7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `168.8 bpm`, ranging from `166.4` to `171.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `162.6 spm`, with a working range of `159.0` to `165.4 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `160.9 spm` (-4.4 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:36 /km` across `5.651 km` in `31:41` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:17 /km` and second-half pace was `5:56 /km` (+39 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.1 bpm` average and `183 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.9 bpm` in the first half and `171.0 bpm` in the second (+12.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `31:41` out of `31:44` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `0.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `125.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `28.0 m` and `67.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `52.6 m` in the first half and `72.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
